flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Austin Community College District rose 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.8k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Austin Community College District rose 127% between 2021 and 2024 (8.9% → 20.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Austin Community College District rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (26.4k → 30.2k).
